# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# Kong Gateway production configuration (kong.conf)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Logging
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
log_level = notice
proxy_access_log = /dev/stdout
proxy_error_log = /dev/stderr
admin_access_log = /dev/stdout
admin_error_log = /dev/stderr

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Network listeners
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Client-facing traffic (HTTP/HTTPS). Keep 0.0.0.0 only if fronted by a firewall/LB.
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000 reuseport backlog=16384, 0.0.0.0:8443 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=16384

# Admin API (restrict to internal network/VPC subnet where possible)
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001 reuseport backlog=1024, 127.0.0.1:8444 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=1024

# Optional: Admin GUI (if used)
# admin_gui_listen = 127.0.0.1:8002 reuseport backlog=1024, 127.0.0.1:8445 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=1024

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# SSL (provide your certs/keys if enabling Admin/Proxy TLS here)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# ssl_cert = /etc/kong/ssl/kong.crt
# ssl_cert_key = /etc/kong/ssl/kong.key
# admin_ssl_cert = /etc/kong/ssl/admin.crt
# admin_ssl_cert_key = /etc/kong/ssl/admin.key
ssl_protocols = TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3
ssl_prefer_server_ciphers = on

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Database (PostgreSQL recommended for production)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
database = postgres
pg_host = kong-postgres
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = kong
pg_password = ${KONG_PG_PASSWORD}
pg_database = kong
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on
pg_timeout = 5000

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Performance / worker tuning
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_worker_rlimit_nofile = 65536
nginx_http_client_max_body_size = 10m
nginx_http_keepalive_timeout = 60s
nginx_http_keepalive_requests = 10000

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Security hardening
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Disable anonymous reports for production (optional)
anonymous_reports = off

# Headers
headers = off

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# DNS
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
dns_resolver = 8.8.8.8:53, 1.1.1.1:53
dns_valid_ttl = 300
dns_stale_ttl = 3600

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plugins (adjust as needed)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
plugins = bundled

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Misc
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
real_ip_header = X-Forwarded-For
real_ip_recursive = on
